R=#X return z(k)end,function(x,f)local z=O(f)local l=function(l,Y,X,o,k)return R(x,{l;Y;X,o;k},f,z)end return l end,function(x,f)local z=O(f)local l=function(l,Y,X,o,k,j)return end,function(x)u[x]=u[x]-(-444104+444105)if-188886-(-188886)==u[x]then u[x],j[x]=nil,nil end end,function(x)local f,R=-351726-(-351727),x[590145+-590144]while R do
